title: Real Big Trees
description: Adds "mega" tree variants to all trees that don't have one already.
body:
**Real Big Trees**


RTB, or Real Big Trees, is a small QoL mod that gives trees a "mega" variant if they don't already have one. Acacia, Birch, and Oak now have mega variants that can either be crafted with 4 of their vanilla-variant saplings, or found (very rarely) in their respective biomes naturally. 



Best if used with [TreeChop](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/treechop) or [FallingTree](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/falling-tree).

Need help or want to report something? Join our Discord! https://discord.gg/vPTNMXESKK
